lastAssistantMessage:
Yes. The global `dmux` is linked to this worktree:

```bash
/Users/justinschroeder/Library/pnpm/global/5/node_modules/dmux
  -> /Users/justinschroeder/Projects/dmux/.dmux/worktrees/dmux-slowness-codex
```

And I rebuilt after the timeout fix, so the linked global command is using the updated `dist/` output. You can test from any project with:

```bash
dmux
```

One note: if you make more source edits here, run this again before testing globally:

```bash
pnpm run build
```
